html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Tables Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Tables Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Round Table		 ×2 "Well rounded." deco_table_round

Hard Wood Desk		 ×4 "Heavy, so hire movers." deco_table_banker

DIY Table		 ×3 "Put together for you." deco_table_diy

College Table		 ×1 "Made from raw materials." deco_table_raw

Crate Table		 ×1 "Recycled repurposed trees." deco_table_crate

Chess Table		 ×1 "Knights not included." deco_table_chess
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Tables Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Tables Tab:
Name
Recipe
Description
Spawn Code
Round Table
×2
"Well rounded."
deco_table_round
“It's a round table.”
–Wilson, when examining a Round Table
“Circular boring.”
–Willow, when examining a Round Table
“Wolfgang eat in style.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Round Table
“Ornamentation is pointless.”
–Wendy, when examining a Round Table

“Functional.”

“Nice wood grain.”

“A table.”

“Circular.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Round Table
“A surface for cönsuming my meat!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Round Table
“That's a nice little table.”
–Webber, when examining a Round Table
“I could eat off there.”
–Walani, when examining a Round Table
“I could eat on that!”
–Warly, when examining a Round Table
“'Tis a chart table.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Round Table
“'TIS TABLE”
–Wilba, when examining a Round Table
“Flat thing”
–Wormwood, when examining a Round Table
“Every place needs a table.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Round Table

“'Tis not seaw'rthy.”

“I could play checkers on here.”
–Walani, when examining a Chess Table
“One could eat off it, I suppose.”
–Warly, when examining a Chess Table
“'Tis a chart table. Fer chessmen.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Chess Table
“'TIS TABLE O' CHECKERING”
–Wilba, when examining a Chess Table
“Game?”
–Wormwood, when examining a Chess Table
“I guess I could play myself.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Chess Table

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thẻ Bàn là một danh mục chế tạo dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Tab Đổi mới.
title: Tables Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Tables.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Tables Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC.
